parsed.clarification_question: What specific help do you need with this section: (a) polishing the writing style and flow (R1.6), (b) checking logical consistency of the arguments (R1.2), (c) reorganizing the structure (R1.5), or (d) reframing the conceptual contribution (R1.1)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing because any assistance with a research section must ensure that limitations and uncertainties in the claims are transparently communicated.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerating the contributions or results in the section's description of the protocol and findings.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep the help focused strictly on the provided section without expanding to unrelated aspects of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to ensure that suggestions do not promote misuse of the NL-to-SQL technology in sensitive applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to maintain clear attribution of ideas and ensure any changes track back to the original artifact content.
